final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] in0,
    input [3:0] in1,
    input [3:0] in2,
    input [3:0] in3,
    input [1:0] sel,
    input enable,
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        out <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        case (sel)
            2'b00: out <= in0;
            2'b01: out <= in1;
            2'b10: out <= in2;
            2'b11: out <= in3;
        endcase
    end else begin
        out <= 4'b0000;
    end
end

endmodule
